title: AI Center of Excellence
summary: Learn about the AI Center of Excellence (AI CoE), how it centralizes information about AI adoption, operations, governance, best practices, and security.

sections.title: AI Center of Excellence
sections.summary: Learn about the AI Center of Excellence (AI CoE), how it centralizes information about AI adoption, operations, governance, best practices, and security.

lessons.title: Introduction to the AI Center of Excellence
lessons.content_md:
Learn how an AI Center of Excellence guides responsible AI adoption by setting strategy, governance guardrails, reusable patterns, intake priorities, roles, skilling, and operating practices.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-ai-center-excellence/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to the AI Center of Excellence

lessons.title: Guide AI workload operations with an AI Center of Excellence
lessons.content_md:
How comprehensive operations guidance from an AI Center of Excellence can help an organization to effectively deploy, manage, and maintain AI workloads.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guide-ai-operations-center-excellence/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Guide AI workload operations with an AI Center of Excellence

lessons.title: Introduction to AI Landing Zones
lessons.content_md:
Introduction to using Azure landing zones with AI workloads

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-ai-landing-zones/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica AI Center of Excellence
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **AI Center of Excellence**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
